_meta.description: Official IEA (Indian Evidence Act, 1872) -> BSA (Bharatiya Sakshya Adhiniyam, 2023) correspondence, parsed from the NCRB Corresponding Section Table.
_meta.transition_rule: Matters on or after 2024-07-01 fall under the BSA; earlier matters remain under the IEA.
_meta.verification_note: Mapping data is from the official NCRB Corresponding Section Table; 1 human clarifying note(s) merged from _curated_overlay.json.

7.offence: Facts which are occasion, cause or effect of facts in issue or relevant facts

11.offence: When facts not otherwise relevant become relevant
